children.name: No extraneous changes on Slide 7
children.description: Checks that no unrelated content, bullets, or sections were added or removed from Slide 7, except the requested bullet point.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Only allow a single new bullet with 'Aquifer contamination' to be added to Slide 7.
    # We'll compare text content of Slide 7 before and after.
    from pptx import Presentation
    before = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    after = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    s_before = before.slides[6] if len(before.slides) > 6 else None
    s_after = after.slides[6] if len(after.slides) > 6 else None
    if s_before is None or s_after is None:
        return "Slide 7 missing in one of the presentations.", 0.0
    def extract_text(slide):
        texts = []
        for shape in slide.shapes:
            if not shape.has_text_frame:
                continue
            for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                texts.append((para.text.strip(), para.level))
        return texts
    before_texts = set(extract_text(s_before))
    after_texts = set(extract_text(s_after))
    added = after_texts - before_texts
    removed = before_texts - after_texts
    extraneous_added = [t for t, l in added if 'aquifer contamination' not in t.lower()]
    extraneous_removed = [t for t, l in removed]
    if len(extraneous_added) == 0 and len(extraneous_removed) == 0:
        return "No extraneous changes on Slide 7.", 1.0
    else:
        msg = f"Extraneous changes detected on Slide 7: added={extraneous_added}, removed={extraneous_removed}"
        return msg, 0.0
